chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1191 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.4638/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.4639/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
